creator: paul@aps.org
text:
When attempting to build lang/erlang on CURRENT the follow error occurs regarding some sctp data structures. Let me know if this is actually an erlang issue and I should submit to the maintainers.

 -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/ports/lang/erlang-lite/work/otp_src_R11B-5/erts/i386-unknown-freebsd7.0    -DUSE_THREADS  -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT -DHYBRID -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -DUSE_THREADS  -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT  -Ibeam -Isys/unix -Isys/common -Ii386-unknown-freebsd7.0/opt/hybrid -Ii386-unknown-freebsd7.0 -Izlib -Ihipe -I../include/internal -I../include/internal/i386-unknown-freebsd7.0 -Idrivers/common -Idrivers/unix -c drivers/common/inet_drv.c -o obj/i386-unknown-freebsd7.0/opt/hybrid/inet_drv.o
drivers/common/inet_drv.c: In function 'sctp_set_opts':
drivers/common/inet_drv.c:5687: error: 'struct sctp_event_subscribe' has no member named 'sctp_adaption_layer_event'
drivers/common/inet_drv.c: In function 'sctp_fill_opts':
drivers/common/inet_drv.c:6583: error: 'struct sctp_event_subscribe' has no member named 'sctp_adaption_layer_event'
drivers/common/inet_drv.c:6583: warning: left-hand operand of comma expression has no effect
gmake[3]: *** [obj/i386-unknown-freebsd7.0/opt/hybrid/inet_drv.o] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/erlang-lite/work/otp_src_R11B-5/erts/emulator'
gmake[2]: *** [opt] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/erlang-lite/work/otp_src_R11B-5/erts/emulator'
gmake[1]: *** [hybrid] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/erlang-lite/work/otp_src_R11B-5/erts'
gmake: *** [emulator] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to build lang/erlang (or lang/erlang-lite) on CURRENT.
